name: shenmay-ai
description: Shenmay AI — Personalized customer-facing AI agents for B2B SaaS

scripts.install:all: cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.lint: cd server && npm run lint && cd ../client && npm run lint
scripts.test: NODE_ENV=test node tests/tokenizer.test.js && NODE_ENV=test node tests/openai-adapter.test.js && NODE_ENV=test node tests/integration.test.js
scripts.test:unit: NODE_ENV=test node tests/tokenizer.test.js && NODE_ENV=test node tests/openai-adapter.test.js
scripts.test:all: NODE_ENV=test node tests/tokenizer.test.js && NODE_ENV=test node tests/openai-adapter.test.js && NODE_ENV=test node tests/integration.test.js && npx playwright test
